<!-- Conventional Commits title: feat|fix|chore(scope): … , scope ∈ protocol/host/mock / 标题用 Conventional Commits -->

## What & why / 做了什么、为什么

<!-- Briefly: the change and the motivation. Link any issue (#123). / 简述改动与动机,关联 issue。 -->

## How tested / 如何验证

<!-- The host is validated by the mock brick — describe what you ran. / 宿主由 mock 积木验收,说明你跑了什么。 -->
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` && `pnpm lint` pass / 通过
- [ ] Exercised with the mock brick (`pnpm dev:mock`) where relevant / 相关时用 mock 积木验证过

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] **Changeset added** (`pnpm changeset`) — every PR ships one. / 已加 changeset,每个 PR 必带。
- [ ] Comments are **English first, then Chinese** per repo convention. / 注释按"英文 + 中文"顺序。
- [ ] Host stays **domain-blind**: no business meaning parsed in host code; switch on `kind`, color by `tone` only. / 宿主保持域无知:不在宿主代码解析业务含义,只按 `kind` 分发、`tone` 上色。
- [ ] **Protocol frames unchanged** (manifest/signal/action). If touched, justified in the description and discussed first. / 未擅改协议三帧;若改动,已在描述中说明并先行讨论。
- [ ] Untrusted brick data validated at the ingest boundary (`parseSignal` / `parseManifest`). / 不可信 brick 数据在 ingest 边界校验。

<!-- Note: CHANGELOG is generated by changesets — do not hand-edit. / CHANGELOG 由 changesets 生成,勿手写。 -->
